arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the launch configuration.

associate_public_ip_address.description: Indicates whether to assign a public IP address to instances launched from this configuration.

ebs_block_device.description: EBS block devices to attach to the instance, with details like device name, size, and type.

ebs_optimized.description: Whether the instance is optimized for Amazon EBS I/O.

enable_monitoring.description: Indicates if detailed monitoring is enabled for the instances.

ephemeral_block_device.description: Ephemeral block devices to attach to the instance, like instance store volumes.

iam_instance_profile.description: The IAM instance profile to associate with the instance.

id.description: The ID of the launch configuration.

image_id.description: The ID of the AMI to use for the instance.

instance_type.description: The type of instance to use (e.g., t2.micro).

key_name.description: The key pair name to use for SSH access to the instance.

metadata_options.description: Options for the instance metadata service, such as endpoint and token settings.

placement_tenancy.description: The tenancy of the instance (e.g., default or dedicated).

root_block_device.description: Configuration of the root block device of the instance, including size and type.

security_groups.description: The security groups to associate with the instance.

spot_price.description: The maximum hourly price to pay for a Spot Instance.

user_data.description: Base64-encoded user data to provide when launching the instance.
